name: Shiny Chemical Industrial Company Limited
summary: Shiny Chemical Industrial Company Limited manufactures and sells electronic and industrial solvents in Taiwan. The company's electronic solvents include menthyl acetates, ether alcohol esters, other solvents, and customized products; and industrial solvents comprise menthyl acetates, ether ester products, and other solvents. It also provides fumalin and urea glue; and leases storage tanks. The company was founded in 1979 and is based in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.
